title: Pillager Origin
body:
# Pillager

Impact: 1

Grumpy, gray villager with a crossbow. Anything else?

## Powers

### Ol 'Betsy

You start out and deal more damage with a crossbow.

### Pillager Unit \[1\]

You are in the battalion of the pillagers, so they don't attack you.

### Strong

I guess you didn't skip a gym day.

### Aquaphobic

You can't swim.

### Unwieldy

You weren't trained to use some items, like shields and tridents.

### Village and Pillage \[2\]

You don't hold great relationships with villagers.

## Credits

* \[1\] original power by thearchitects6199. find the power here: <https://ptb.discord.com/channels/734127708488859831/825449766384828476/1130158155129683979>
* \[2\] original power by pandadragon2306 for their illager pack. find the pack here: <https://ptb.discord.com/channels/734127708488859831/825449766384828476/1332072958830575676>
* [boxed](https://modrinth.com/user/BoxedBoi) for the idea, made it before he
could >:3
